text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm lovestruck. ♪
I want to hold you close. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This is a song by my friend's favorite idol. She
invited me out to sing it with her at karaoke,
hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The lyrics are a little embarrassing, but they're
easier to say when they're put to a melody. Music
is strange like that, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm lovestruck. ♪
I only have eyes for you. ♪
